title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, October 31 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 31/10/2023
Image reference: 2023-10-31_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-october-31-2023_img1.png
Bulkers
Older Handysize vessels decreased whilst older Supramaxes increased owing torecent sales such as Sun Ruby and Rotterdam Pearl
Panamax BC ASL Neptune (82,400 DWT, Apr 2009, Oshima) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 16.20 mil, VV Value USD 16.28 mil
Supramax BC Rotterdam Pearl (58,000 DWT, Jan 2010, Yangzhou Dayang Shipbuilding) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 13.65 mil, VV Value USD 13.12 mil
Handy BC Sun Ruby (32,800 DWT, Jun 2004, Kanda) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 8.10 mil (DD Due), VV Value USD 8.48 mil
Tankers
Suezmax values increased last week due to the sale of Cherokee and firming rates
Suezmax Cherokee (318,500 DWT, Sep 2016, Hyundai Samho HI) sold to Nordic American Tankers for USD 72 mil (DD Due), VV Value USD 69.67 mil
MR2 (Chem/Product) James Cook and Nord Steady (50,000 DWT, Apr - Jun 2013, STX) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 68 mil (SS/DD Passed), VV Value USD 67.35 mil
MR2 Vanda (48,100 DWT, Jun 2009, Iwagi Zosen) sold to Seven Islands Shipping for USD 23.50 mil, VV Value USD 21.59 mil
